# FilePen

class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" ## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FilePen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FilePen { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```
